zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Anthony Hungerford於大約1485年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾唐 阿普尼時，他的父親Sir John Hungerford MP26歲，母親Lady Margaret Blount21歲。他於1510年之後與Lady Jane Darrell在英國英格蘭維爾爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他於1553年在英國格盧斯特斯爾被列為member of parliament。他去世於1558年11月18日在英國維爾爾格亞特 貝德享年74歲，埋葬在英國維爾爾格亞特 貝德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Anthony Hungerford于大约1485年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾唐 阿普尼时，他的父亲Sir John Hungerford MP26岁，母亲Lady Margaret Blount21岁。他于1510年之后与Lady Jane Darrell在英国英格兰維爾爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他于1553年在英国格盧斯特斯爾被列为member of parliament。他去世于1558年11月18日在英国維爾爾格亞特 貝德享年74岁，埋葬在英国維爾爾格亞特 貝德。

nameMeanings.name: Hungerford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Hungerford (Berkshire), from Old English hungor ‘hunger’, here probably denoting unproductive land, + ford. This surname has been established in Ireland since the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Anthony
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual English form of the old Roman family name Antonius, which is of uncertain (probably Etruscan) origin. The spelling with -th- (not normally reflected in the pronunciation) represents a learned but erroneous attempt to associate it with Greek anthos ‘flower’. In the post-classical period it was a common name, borne by various early saints, most notably a 3rd-century Egyptian hermit monk, who is regarded as the founder of Christian monasticism.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Anthony Hungerford was born about 1485, in Down Ampney, Gloucestershire, England, his father, Sir John Hungerford MP, was 26 and his mother, Lady Margaret Blount, was 21. He married Lady Jane Darrell after 1510, in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 6 daughters. In 1553, at the age of 69, his occupation is listed as member of parliament in Gloucestershire, England. He died on 18 November 1558, in Great Bedwyn, Wiltshire, England, at the age of 74, and was buried in Great Bedwyn, Wiltshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Anthony Hungerford est né environ 1485, à Down Ampney, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Hungerford MP, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Blount, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Lady Jane Darrell après 1510, à Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles. En 1553, à l’âge de 69 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est member of parliament à Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 18 novembre 1558, à Great Bedwyn, Wiltshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterré à Great Bedwyn, Wiltshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Anthony Hungerford um 1485 in Down Ampney, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Hungerford MP 26 und seine Mutter Lady Margaret Blount 21. Er hat nach 1510 in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom Lady Jane Darrell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 6 Töchter. 1553, als er 69 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als member of parliament in Gloucestershire, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 18. November 1558 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Great Bedwyn, Wiltshire, England und wurde in Great Bedwyn, Wiltshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Anthony Hungerford è nato il circa 1485 nel Down Ampney, Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, Sir John Hungerford MP, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Lady Margaret Blount, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Lady Jane Darrell dopo il 1510, nel Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 6 figlie. Nel 1553, all'età di 69 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come member of parliament nel Gloucestershire, England. Morì il 18 novembre 1558, nel Great Bedwyn, Wiltshire, England, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolto a Great Bedwyn, Wiltshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Anthony Hungerfordが約1485年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアダウン アンプニーで生まれた時，父Sir John Hungerford MPは26歳，母Lady Margaret Blountは21歳であった。1510年以後にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアでLady Jane Darrellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。1553年，69歳の時，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアでの職業はmember of parliamentと記録されている。彼は1558年11月18日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアグレアト ベドウインで74歳で死去し，イギリスウィルトシュアイアグレアト ベドウインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Anthony Hungerford(이)가 대략 1485년 영국 그루스스터실르 다운 아p니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Hungerford MP(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Margaret Blount(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1510년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르에서 Lady Jane Darrell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1553년, 69세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 그루스스터실르에서 member of parliament이었다. 그는 1558년 11월 18일 영국 윌츠히르 그리트 베드윈에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 윌츠히르 그리트 베드윈에 묻혔다.

mn.of Boscombe, Wiltshire, England: Boscombe, Wiltūnscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Anthony Hungerford nasceu aproximadamente 1485, em Down Ampney, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Hungerford MP, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret Blount, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Jane Darrell após 1510, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 6 filhas. Em 1553, com 69 anos, sua profissão aparece como member of parliament em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 18 de novembro de 1558, em Great Bedwyn, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, com 74 anos, e foi sepultado em Great Bedwyn, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Anthony Hungerford родился около 1485 г. в местности доун ампни, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Hungerford MP было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Blount, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Jane Darrell после 1510 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей. В 1553 году, в возрасте 69 лет,  он работал по профессии member of parliament в местности глоусестиршир, Англия. Он умер 18 ноября 1558 г. в местности грит бедуин, уилцхир, Англия в возрасте 74 лет и был похоронен в местности грит бедуин, уилцхир, Англия.

sm.1533-1538: mai le 1533 e o'o I le 1538

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Anthony Hungerford nació aproximadamente 1485, en Down Ampney, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Hungerford MP, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Lady Margaret Blount, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Lady Jane Darrell después de 1510, en Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 6 hijas. En 1553, a la edad de 69 años, su ocupación registrada era member of parliament en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Murió el 18 de noviembre de 1558, en Great Bedwyn, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultado en Great Bedwyn, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.
